basic_info.headline: Member of Technical Staff @ Anthropic | Ex Meta, Amazon & Microsoft
basic_info.about:
Engineering leader with extensive experience in developing and deploying mission-critical enterprise software, cloud services, and data infrastructure. Passionate about building scalable, high-performance systems that drive innovation and efficiency.

With expertise spanning algorithms, databases, NoSQL, cloud storage, key-value systems, distributed systems, data pipelines, data query engines, and generative AI, I have successfully led and delivered complex technical initiatives across multiple domains.

Hands-on with LLMs, including Llama 3.1 post-training and Llama 4 pre-training, leveraging PyTorch & CUDA to optimize large-scale model training and deployment.

A proven track record of leading and successfully launching greenfield initiatives, driving product excellence, and scaling engineering teams. Strong problem-solving skills, strategic decision-making, and effective communication enable me to lead cross-functional teams and deliver impactful solutions.

Excited about leveraging cutting-edge AI and data-driven technologies to solve real-world challenges and create meaningful impact.

experience.title: Member of Technical Staff
experience.description: Dev & maintain AI systems with a focus on reliability, interpretability, and controllability.

experience.title: Staff Software Engineer
experience.description:
Gen AI - LLaMA 
  LLaMA 3.1 post-training and LLaMA 4 pre-training : scale-law data ablations, data curation pipelines and led the Infra team to improve data collection 

Infrastructure - Warm Storage Blob Services 
 Co-initiated and led  the 0→1 Meta BLOB Storage  Service (Storage Container), storing  tens of exabytes  ,  billions in CAPEX  ,  and serving  billions of users  daily. 
 ●  Led the  end-to-end product lifecycle  —from prototyping  and development to migration—powering  Generative  AI,  Ads AI training  ,  and user media data. 
 ●  Designed a fully stateless architecture,  achieving  99.9999%  overall system reliability , lower maintenance  costs, and enhanced metadata-driven functionalities. 
 ●  Led optimizations including FatClient, smaller GC scope, smart write encoding, and fast replication, resulting in hundreds of millions in annual savings  . 

 Infrastructure - Everstore Team 
 Key developer of 0→1 Project – Warm Storage, Meta’s highly  distributed and scalable storage fabric  ,  now serving hundreds of exabytes  across Data Warehouse and media  of  Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Oculus. 
 ●  Designed and implemented clients, compaction, transcoding, and append semantics in Block Service. 
 ●  Led testing and migration from legacy Everstore systems (Haystack, f4), ensuring a seamless transition and improved  performance.

experience.title: Sr. Software Dev. Engineer
experience.description: Manager/Tech Lead, Amazon Wireless – Built the  ordering pipeline  with Amazon SWF  , Java, XSLT, integrating with major carriers (AT&T, Verizon, Deutsche Telekom). Developed fraud prevention, commissions, and support tools. Support Amazon Fire Phone launch, leveraging  Amazon ML for  fraud detection  .

experience.title: Software Design Engineer
experience.description:
Software Design Engineer in Microsoft SQL Server team
●  Developed and shipped the first  in-memory BI engine  for Microsoft Power BI  in a fast-paced startup environment. 
 ●  Contributed to the SQL Server Relational Engine team, successfully shipping  SQL Server 2005 & 2008 .
